openai-pro-plan.title: What is ChatGPT Pro? | OpenAI Help Center
openai-pro-plan.excerpt: What is ChatGPT Pro? | OpenAI Help Center All Collections ChatGPT What is ChatGPT Pro? What is ChatGPT Pro? Information about our paid subscription plan, Pro. Updated: 2 months ago Benefits of ChatGPT Pro Everything included in ChatGPT Plus : Faster responses, priority access, voice mode, custom GPTs, image generation, deep research, ChatGPT agent, and more Unlimited access to GPT-5 and select legacy models Unlimited access to advanced voice Including higher limits for video and screensharing Prioritized traffic and no peak hour limits Minimized disruptions, even during highest demand times Early access to new features and models Be among the first to try new capabilities as they launch Extended access to deep research and ChatGPT agent Uses reasoning to synthesize large amounts of online information and complete multi-step research tasks for you Extended access to Sora video generation Access to research preview of Codex agent *Unlimited access is subject to abuse guardrails. Note on Unlimited Access The ChatGPT Pro plan offers unlimited access to GPT-5 as well as our legacy models. However, usage must adhere to our Terms of Use , which prohibits, among other things: Abusive usage

openai-business-limits.title: ChatGPT Business - Models & Limits | OpenAI Help Center
openai-business-limits.excerpt: ChatGPT Business - Models & Limits | OpenAI Help Center All Collections ChatGPT Business ChatGPT Business - Models & Limits ChatGPT Business - Models & Limits Updated: 21 days ago As of February 13, 2026, models GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, OpenAI o4-mini, and GPT-5 (Instant and Thinking) have been retired from ChatGPT and are no longer available. API access remains unchanged. For more information, please refer to our article: Retiring GPT-4o and other ChatGPT models Note: As of August 29th, 2025, we've renamed ChatGPT Team to ChatGPT Business. For more information and questions related to the name change, please refer to our article: ChatGPT Business Rename FAQ The ChatGPT Business subscription is a self-serve subscription plan designed for organizations and businesses wishing to adopt ChatGPT for use among their teams. ChatGPT Business is available for 2 or more users. If you're looking for a larger option, please consider ChatGPT Enterprise. If you are on ChatGPT flexible pricing, please refer to this page for latest rates on our models, features and products. Model Picker In the model picker, Auto automatically switches between Instant and Thinking, and you can also

openai-codex-plan.title: Using Codex with your ChatGPT plan | OpenAI Help Center
openai-codex-plan.excerpt: Using Codex with your ChatGPT plan | OpenAI Help Center All Collections Codex Using Codex with your ChatGPT plan Using Codex with your ChatGPT plan How to access and get started with Codex Updated: 15 hours ago Note: This document is meant to serve as a general overview. For additional technical details, please view our Codex page . Codex is included with ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise/Edu plans. For a limited time Codex is included with ChatGPT Free and Go, and all other plans enjoy 2x rate limits. Important: This article is about Codex (the coding agent) only. Image and video generation (Sora, ChatGPT Images, DALL·E) and Voice features have separate usage limits and reset periods. If you see banners like “50 images in the last day” or “resets in 720 hours” or reach Voice caps, those limits do not apply to Codex. For details, see image & video generation limits and voice usage limits . What is Codex? Codex is an AI coding agent that helps you write, review, and ship code faster. You can pair with it in your local tools or delegate work for it to complete in the cloud. Pair with Codex in your terminal, IDE or the Codex app. Starting from a prompt or spec, Codex navigat

openai-codex-upgrades.title: Introducing upgrades to Codex | OpenAI
openai-codex-upgrades.excerpt: Introducing upgrades to Codex | OpenAI Research Products Business Developers Company Foundation Log in Try ChatGPT (opens in a new window) Research Products Business Developers Company Foundation Try ChatGPT (opens in a new window) Login OpenAI Table of contents GPT-5-Codex Updates to Codex Building safe and trustworthy AI agents Pricing and availability September 15, 2025 Release Product Introducing upgrades to Codex Codex just got faster, more reliable, and better at real-time collaboration and tackling tasks independently anywhere you develop—whether via the terminal, IDE, web, or even your phone. Get started $ npm i -g @openai/codex Loading… Share Update on September 23, 2025 : GPT‑5‑Codex is now available to developers using Codex via API key (in addition to being available to developers using Codex via their ChatGPT subscription). GPT‑5 Codex is available at the same price as GPT‑5, and is available in the Responses API only. The underlying model snapshot will be regularly updated. openai-codex-app.title: Introducing the Codex app | OpenAI
openai-codex-app.excerpt: Introducing the Codex app | OpenAI Research Products Business Developers Company Foundation Log in Try ChatGPT (opens in a new window) Research Products Business Developers Company Foundation Try ChatGPT (opens in a new window) Login OpenAI Table of contents The Codex app: A command center for agents Secure by default, configurable by design Availability & pricing What’s next February 2, 2026 Product Introducing the Codex app Expanding what developers can do, with the new Codex app for macOS. Loading… Share March 4, 2026 update: The Codex app is now available on Windows. Today, we’re introducing the Codex app for macOS—a powerful new interface designed to effortlessly manage multiple agents at once, run work in parallel, and collaborate with agents over long-running tasks. We're also excited to show more people what's now possible with Codex ⁠ . For a limited time we're including Codex with ChatGPT Free and Go, and we're doubling the rate limits on Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Edu plans. Those higher limits apply everywhere you use Codex—in the app, from the CLI, in your IDE, and in the cloud. The Codex app changes how software gets built and who can bui

openai-model-release-notes.title: Model Release Notes | OpenAI Help Center
openai-model-release-notes.excerpt: Model Release Notes | OpenAI Help Center All Collections ChatGPT Model Release Notes Model Release Notes Updated: 23 days ago GPT-5.2 Instant Update (February 10, 2026) We’re making an update to GPT-5.2 Instant in ChatGPT and the API that improves response style and quality. Users should notice responses that are more measured and grounded in tone, in a way that’s more contextually appropriate to the conversation. The model also tends to output clearer, more relevant answers to advice-seeking and how-to questions, more reliably placing the most important info upfront. Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex (February 5, 2026) Today, we launched GPT-5.3-Codex , our most capable agentic coding model yet. This model is the first that combines Codex + GPT-5 training stacks -- bringing together best-in-class code generation, reasoning, and general-purpose intelligence in one unified model. It’s ~ 25% faster, sets new highs on key benchmarks, and marks a step-change from code generation to a general-purpose coding agent you can actively steer while it works. Read more. wise-security-access.title: Untitled
wise-security-access.excerpt: Security & Access | Wise Platform Skip to content Guides API Reference Changelog Search Ctrl+K Back to Guides Auth and Security Introduction mTLS JOSE SCA & 2FA Personal Token Migration Last updated 1 day ago Security & Access Copy Copy for LLM Copy page as Markdown for LLMs View as Markdown Open this page as Markdown Open in ChatGPT Get insights from ChatGPT Open in Claude Get insights from Claude Connect to Cursor Install MCP server on Cursor Connect to VS Code Install MCP server on VS Code Learn how Wise Platform handles security. Wise supports two ways to authenticate to the Wise Platform API. Use a personal API token if you’re a small business user automating your own Wise account. Use OAuth 2.0 if you’re a partner building for end customers or a large enterprise. Personal API token (Small Business Users) A personal token authenticates requests for a single Wise.com user and has limited API access compared to OAuth credentials. To generate an API token, go to Wise.com and select your business profile. Then go to Your Account > Integrations and Tools > API tokens > Add new Token (2‑step login is required). You can then pass this token with Authorization: Bearer token i

steel-sessions-overview.excerpt: Overview Search... Overview Integrations Cookbook Changelog API Reference 5.5 k Search... Sign in Overview Intro to Steel Steel CLI + Skill Need Help? Pricing/Limits Guides Connect with Playwright (Node) Connect with Playwright (Python) Connect with Puppeteer Connect with Selenium Sessions API Overview Quickstart Session Lifecycle Mobile Mode Multi-region Embed Sessions Implement Human-in-the-Loop Controls Reusing Context & Auth Credentials API Overview Files API Overview Extensions API Overview Captchas API Overview Profiles API Overview Self-Hosting Docker Railway Render Steel Local vs Steel Cloud Stealth Captcha Solving Proxies llms-full.txt Legal Overview The Sessions API lets you create and control cloud-based browser sessions through simple API calls. Each session is like a fresh incognito window, but running in our cloud and controlled through code. Go to Quickstart Example What is a Session? Sessions are the atomic unit of our Sessions API. Think of sessions as giving your AI agents their own dedicated browser windows. Just like you might open an incognito window to start a fresh browsing session, the Sessions API lets your agents spin up isolated browser instances on deman

Overview Steel's profiles API allows you to create, update, and persist profiles across sessions. Profiles are used to store information about the browser session like auth, cookies, extensions, credentials, and browser settings.
